The '''''Aurorient Express''''' was a [[Luxury liner/Legends|luxury cruise liner]] on the [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] [[Yorn Skot]] owned by [[Clode Rhoden]] and captained by a [[Unidentified Aurorient Express captain|Neimoidian]].

==History==
The ship became a target for the eco-terrorist group [[Green Forge]], who attempted to blow it up as well as have Rhoden assassinated for his insurance money. The plot took place under the guise of an attack by [[pressure pirates]], who coincidentally, were attacking the ship at that precise time. Despite being torn apart by the pirates' [[Fastlatch-class defense droid|''Fastlatch''-class defense droids]], ''Aurorient Express'' was saved by [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], only to be destroyed by a [[core bomb]] left active by disgruntled employees.

{{Ship-stub}}
